justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the initial past date and all subsequent specific and flexible requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete alternative options, which led to a lengthy back-and-forth.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls, checking for availability for each specific time and day even when the user requested multiple options in a single turn.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt somewhat tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative slots, leading to many turns of the user proposing times and the agent reporting unavailability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context throughout the conversation but did not intelligently expand its search or offer alternatives, instead repeatedly asking the user for new times or days.

overall_notes: The agent successfully booked an appointment but the process was inefficient due to its reactive approach to finding available slots.
